sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: NeoVolta updates fiscal 2026 financial performance
feed.summary: NeoVolta Inc. reported a significant increase in Q2 FY2026 revenue, reaching $4.6 million, a 334% growth attributed to higher residential inverter and energy storage system sales. The company also saw its six-month revenue rise to $11.3 million and made progress on its NeoVolta Power joint venture in Georgia, targeting mass production by mid-2026. To support growth, NeoVolta raised approximately $23 million through private placement and a registered direct offering.

feed.title: Colliers International Group (NASDAQ:CIGI) Given New $185.00 Price Target at Raymond James Financial
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has lowered its price target for Colliers International Group (NASDAQ:CIGI) from $200.00 to $185.00, while maintaining a "strong-buy" rating, indicating a potential 66.68% upside. Other analysts have also adjusted their targets, with the stock holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and a target price of $168.89. The company's shares recently traded down, with institutional investors owning a significant portion of the stock.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Boosts Bank of Nova Scotia (TSE:BNS) Price Target to C$114.00
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has increased its price target for Bank of Nova Scotia (TSE:BNS) to C$114.00 from C$109.00, maintaining an "outperform" rating, which suggests a potential upside of 9.57%. Other analysts like Barclays, Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce, TD Securities, Jefferies Financial Group, and BMO Capital Markets have also recently raised their price objectives for the bank's stock. Despite these increases, the consensus rating from MarketBeat analysts remains a "Hold" with an average target price of C$100.42.

feed.title: National Bank Financial Increases Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) Price Target to C$186.00
feed.summary: National Bank Financial has raised its price target for Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) to C$186.00, maintaining a "sector perform" rating, which implies a slight downside from its current trading price. Other analysts have also adjusted their targets, contributing to a consensus price target of C$192.17 for BMO, with a mix of "Buy" and "Hold" ratings. The bank recently reported C$3.28 EPS on C$9.34 billion in revenue for its last quarter.

feed.title: Securities Fraud Investigation Into Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. (BABA) Continues – Investors Who Lost Money Urged to Contact Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP, A Leading Securities Fraud Law Firm
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is continuing its securities fraud investigation into Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. (BABA) on behalf of investors who lost money. The investigation stems from a November 2024 Financial Times article alleging Alibaba's assistance to the Chinese military, and a February 2026 incident where the Pentagon briefly listed Alibaba as aiding the military. These events caused significant drops in Alibaba's stock price, leading the law firm to encourage affected investors to seek legal recourse.

feed.title: Upstart Stock Up 4.8% After Neutral Rating & $30 Price Target - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Upstart's stock rose 4.8% after Compass Point upgraded its rating from Sell to Neutral and increased its price target to $30, following the company's Q4 2025 earnings report which projected 35% annual revenue growth through 2028. Despite this positive movement, the stock remains volatile and is down 30.2% year-to-date, trading significantly below its 52-week high, partly due to broader market sell-offs and reduced expectations for interest rate cuts.

feed.title: Citigroup Record Revenues And Russia Exit Refocus Earnings Mix And Valuation
feed.summary: Citigroup (NYSE:C) reported record revenues in 2025, leading to an increase in CEO Jane Fraser’s compensation and significant progress in its restructuring plans, including an exit from Russian operations. These strategic moves are expected to re-evaluate the bank's earnings mix, capital deployment, and long-term return potential for investors. Despite a recent 6.1% decline in its 30-day return, the company's shares are trading 36.6% below their estimated fair value, offering a potential value signal for investors.

feed.title: MGM Goodwill Charge And Heavy Buybacks Reshape Per Share Outlook
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) recently reported a goodwill impairment charge in Q4 2025 and continued its significant share buyback program. These actions affect the company's balance sheet presentation and reduce the share count, impacting per-share metrics. While the goodwill charge is minor compared to revenue, the buybacks have retired over 66 million shares, raising questions about financial flexibility given high debt and lower profit margins, but also offering potential for future EPS growth if earnings forecasts are met.

feed.title: Allegion Schedules Q4 and Full-Year 2025 Earnings Release Following Nine-Month Revenue Growth
feed.summary: Allegion plc has announced it will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings results on February 17, 2026. The company, a global provider of security and access control solutions, has demonstrated consistent revenue growth through the first nine months of fiscal 2025 across its commercial and residential markets. Analysts maintain neutral ratings on Allegion, focusing on margin performance and organic growth amidst stable share price performance and modest dividend increases.

feed.title: Medtronic completes first U.S. cases with Hugo
feed.summary: Medtronic has announced the successful completion of the first U.S. commercial cases utilizing its Hugo soft-tissue robotic surgery system. Dr. Jihad Kaouk of Cleveland Clinic performed a robotic-assisted prostatectomy, marking a significant step following FDA clearance for urologic procedures late last year. This move positions Medtronic to challenge Intuitive's longstanding dominance in the U.S. soft-tissue surgical robotics market, with CEO Geoff Martha expressing optimism about future expansions into additional indications.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Oracle Corporation Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit on behalf of Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) investors who purchased securities between June 12, 2025, and December 16, 2025. This action follows significant drops in Oracle's stock price after the announcement of a large cloud computing contract with OpenAI, subsequent plans to raise $38 billion in debt for AI buildout, and a disclosed increase in fiscal 2026 CapEx by $15 billion. Investors are encouraged to contact the firm by April 6, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: Grandson of Reese’s inventor accuses Hershey of quietly swapping out original ingredients
feed.summary: Brad Reese, grandson of Reese's Peanut Butter Cup inventor H.B. Reese, has accused The Hershey Company of replacing original ingredients with inferior alternatives. In a letter to Hershey's communications manager and in a phone interview, Reese claims the company is using compound coatings instead of milk chocolate and peanut butter cremes instead of peanut butter. Hershey has not commented, though candy manufacturers often adjust recipes due to rising cocoa prices, which can lead to products no longer qualifying as "milk chocolate" under U.S. standards.

feed.title: Argus Raises Honeywell International Price Target to $290 From $250
feed.summary: Argus has increased its price target for Honeywell International (HON) to $290 from $250. This update indicates Argus's maintained positive outlook on the company's stock. The article also lists other recent news concerning Honeywell, including executive appointments and dividend announcements.

feed.title: Why Allegion (ALLE) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
feed.summary: Allegion's (ALLE) stock is trading lower after the company reported fourth-quarter earnings below Wall Street estimates and provided a weaker-than-expected forecast for 2026. While Q4 revenue was in line with expectations at $1.03 billion, adjusted earnings per share of $1.94 missed the consensus. The company's 2026 adjusted EPS guidance of $8.70 to $8.90 also disappointed investors, suggesting a more cautious outlook than anticipated.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences, China's Qinhao Pharmaceutical Sign Global Deal for Tumor Therapy Candidate
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences has signed a global agreement with China's Qinhao Pharmaceutical for a tumor therapy candidate. This deal was announced on February 17, 2026, and is reported by MT Newswires. Further details about the specific therapy candidate were not immediately available in the provided text.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group Agrees to Acquire Matrix Capital Markets Group
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group has announced a definitive agreement to acquire Matrix Capital Markets Group, a leading advisory firm specializing in the downstream energy and convenience retail sector. This acquisition, expected to close in the first quarter of 2026, will strengthen Citizens' sector-focused advisory capabilities and allow Matrix to operate as a division of Citizens JMP Securities (CJMPS). Both companies emphasize a shared commitment to providing tailored advisory services and solutions with deep sector expertise to clients.

feed.title: Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. Buys Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) Stock
feed.summary: Representative Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. (D-California) recently purchased between $1,001 and $15,000 worth of Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) stock on January 30th. This purchase comes as Intuitive Surgical exceeded earnings expectations, with its shares trading up and analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" rating. Despite significant insider selling over the past 90 days, institutional investors hold a substantial portion of the company's stock.

feed.title: First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) Stock Acquired Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr.
feed.summary: Representative Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. (D-California) recently purchased between $1,001 and $15,000 worth of First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) shares on January 9th, as disclosed in a February 13th filing. First Solar currently trades at $226.70 with a $24.33 billion market cap, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $275.61. Institutional investors own approximately 92% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. Sells Off Shares of Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX)
feed.summary: Representative Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. (D-California) recently sold between $15,001 and $50,000 worth of Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) stock on January 9th, as disclosed in a February 13th filing. This sale comes as Chevron raised its quarterly dividend to $1.78, yet insiders have been net sellers, moving approximately $127.9 million in shares over the last three months. Chevron's stock traded down about 1.9% to $180.27, despite beating EPS estimates in its latest earnings report, with revenue falling 10.2% year-over-year.

feed.title: Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. Sells W.R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE:WRB) Shares
feed.summary: Representative Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. (D-California) recently sold between $1,001 and $15,000 of W.R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE:WRB) stock on January 20th. This disclosure was made on February 13th, showing the trade occurred through his "150 MAIN STREET TRUST > BANK OF AMERICA" account. W.R. Berkley reported quarterly EPS of $1.13, missing consensus by $0.01, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.09.

feed.title: Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. Purchases Shares of Biogen Inc. (NASDAQ:BIIB)
feed.summary: Representative Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. recently disclosed a purchase of $1,001–$15,000 in Biogen Inc. (NASDAQ:BIIIB) shares on January 30th. This transaction was part of a series of stock purchases by the Representative across various companies. Biogen recently exceeded earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $1.99 against an estimated $1.61 and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Medtronic gets FDA nod for Infuse bone graft in TLIF procedures
feed.summary: Medtronic announced that its Infuse bone graft received FDA premarket approval for use in TLIF (transforaminal lumbar interbody fusion) procedures at one or two levels from L2-S1, making it the only growth factor bone graft with PMA for ALIF, OLIF, and TLIF. The approval is supported by clinical data from 493 patients, showing fusion rates exceeding 90% in single-level TLIF and strong results in two-level constructs. This expansion offers surgeons a highly validated option for complex fusion cases, enhancing treatment tailoring for individual patient needs.

feed.title: T1 Energy Stock Surges Amid Expansion Plans and Strategic Moves
feed.summary: T1 Energy Inc.'s stock surged by 7.27% following its expansion into the Asian market and the strategic acquisition of a rival firm. Despite financial struggles with profit margins, the company's new technology advancements and proactive engagement with regulators are expected to improve operational efficiency and mitigate risks. These strategic moves aim to bolster long-term stability and market position in the renewable energy sector.

feed.title: Fund Update: New $171.0M $BAI stock position opened by BANK OF AMERICA CORP |DE|
feed.summary: BANK OF AMERICA CORP |DE| has initiated a new $171.0 million position in $BAI stock, as revealed in its latest SEC 13F filing for the Q4 2025 reporting period. This move is part of broader institutional activity, with 423 investors increasing their holdings in BAI while 55 decreased theirs. Major additions include Dynasty Wealth Management, JPMorgan Chase & Co., and Bank of America Corp itself.

feed.title: $56.85M Wells Fargo CARES Act class action settlement
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has agreed to a $56.85 million class action settlement to resolve claims it violated the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) by incorrectly reporting CARES Act forbearances. The settlement benefits California mortgagors whose "current" accounts were reported as "in forbearance" after receiving a CARES Act forbearance. No claim form is required for eligible class members, who will automatically receive a share of the net settlement fund.

feed.title: Market Whales and Their Recent Bets on UNP Options
feed.summary: Large investors have shown a bullish sentiment towards Union Pacific (NYSE: UNP) through significant options trading activity. Benzinga’s options scanner detected 8 unusual trades, predominantly calls, indicating targeted price movements between $250.0 and $290.0. The article highlights UNP's current market status, with its stock up by 1.05% to $259.62, and includes recent analyst ratings with an average price target of $267.5.

feed.title: AT&T Lawsuit: NYC Pension Funds Challenge Diversity Data Block for 2026 Meeting - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Four New York City public pension funds have sued AT&T, alleging the company wrongly refused a shareholder vote on disclosing its workforce breakdown by race, ethnicity, and gender for its 2026 annual meeting. The funds claim AT&T is improperly using a recent SEC policy change to block the proposal, despite previously disclosing this data from 2021-2023. This lawsuit highlights broader tensions as many companies deemphasize diversity efforts following recent political pressure.

feed.title: Why Vulcan Materials (VMC) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
feed.summary: Shares of Vulcan Materials (VMC) fell 5.5% after the company reported weaker-than-expected fourth-quarter 2025 earnings and provided a disappointing financial outlook for 2026. The construction materials company missed revenue and adjusted EPS estimates, and its guidance for 2026 adjusted EBITDA also fell short of analyst expectations. Despite today's drop, VMC shares are up 5.6% year-to-date and are trading near their 52-week high, with a significant return for long-term investors.

feed.title: Demystifying Baxter International: Insights From 4 Analyst Reviews
feed.summary: Four analysts have offered varied opinions on Baxter International (NYSE: BAX) in the last quarter, resulting in a negative shift in sentiment and a 17.92% decrease in the average price target to $21.75. The company's financial health shows challenges with a reduced market capitalization, lower net margin, and ROE/ROA below industry averages, alongside a high debt-to-equity ratio of 1.6. These factors suggest potential hurdles in profitability, asset utilization, and financial leverage for Baxter International.

feed.title: BofA reinstates Rollins stock coverage with buy rating on growth outlook
feed.summary: BofA Securities has reinstated coverage on Rollins Inc. (NYSE:ROL) with a buy rating and a price target of $67.00, suggesting a 12% upside. The firm highlights Rollins' strong growth algorithm, combining organic expansion with strategic acquisitions, which helps the company gain market share in the fragmented pest control industry. Despite a recent earnings miss, BofA is confident in Rollins' ability to achieve high-single-digit revenue growth and improve EBITDA margins.

feed.title: BRODSKY & SMITH SHAREHOLDER UPDATE: Notifying Investors of
feed.summary: Brodsky & Smith LLC is investigating potential breaches of fiduciary duties by the boards of Masimo Corporation (MASI), IHS Holding Limited (IHS), VerifyMe, Inc. (VRME), and Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corporation (GLDD). These investigations stem from recent merger agreements, with the firm questioning whether the deals provide fair value to shareholders and if the boards conducted fair processes. Shareholders are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss these investigations without financial obligation.

feed.title: Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE:ACA) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE:ACA) saw a 13.8% decrease in short interest in January, with 769,642 shares shorted and a 3.8 days-to-cover ratio. The stock is heavily owned by institutional investors (90.66%) and has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, though its current trading price of $126.11 is above the consensus target of $117.50. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.05.

feed.title: Best Consumer Stock to Buy Right Now: Costco or Home Depot?
feed.summary: This article evaluates Costco (COST) and Home Depot (HD) as top consumer stocks, highlighting their business models, growth prospects, and valuations. Costco is presented as a high-quality business with stable demand and a strong membership model, but with a high P/E ratio. Home Depot, while facing cyclical demand, is a leader in a large market with long-term growth potential, and trades at a lower valuation.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) Given "Buy" Rating at DA Davidson
feed.summary: DA Davidson has reiterated a "Buy" rating for Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) with a $460 price target, suggesting a potential upside of 47.20%. This comes despite Tyler missing its latest quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. The consensus rating from analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $467.54.

feed.title: Option traders moderately bearish in Sandisk Corporation with shares down 3.01%
feed.summary: Option traders are showing a moderately bearish sentiment towards SanDisk Corporation as its shares experienced a 3.01% drop. While calls slightly outnumber puts with a put/call ratio of 0.83, the implied volatility has increased, suggesting an expected daily move of over $40. The steepening put-call skew further indicates a rising demand for downside protection among traders.

feed.title: Humana (HUM): Goldman Sachs Maintains "Sell" Rating, Cuts Price Target | HUM Stock News
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has maintained its "Sell" rating for Humana (HUM) and significantly cut its price target from $215 to $158, representing a 26.51% decrease. This adjustment follows similar price target reductions and rating changes from other analysts like TD Cowen, Cantor Fitzgerald, Guggenheim, RBC Capital, and UBS, reflecting a cautious outlook on the company's future performance. Despite the recent analyst downgrades, the average target price from 25 analysts is $236.41, implying a 27.21% upside from the current price, with GuruFocus estimating a GF Value of $529.26, suggesting an even larger upside.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Lowers TransUnion (TRU) Price Target to $80, Maint
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has lowered its price target for TransUnion (TRU) to $80 from $92 but maintained a Neutral rating. This adjustment follows similar reductions from other analysts, though the average brokerage recommendation for TRU remains "Outperform" based on 21 firms. TransUnion is a major credit bureau, and despite the lowered price targets, analysts project a potential upside from its current price.

feed.title: DA Davidson Maintains Buy Rating for Tyler Technologies (TYL)
feed.summary: DA Davidson has reaffirmed its 'Buy' rating for Tyler Technologies (TYL) with a consistent price target of $460.00. This comes amidst several other firms lowering their price targets for TYL, reflecting a cautious but varied outlook on the company's future performance. Tyler Technologies provides software solutions and services primarily to local government entities, and analysts' average target price suggests a significant upside from its current trading price.

feed.title: THC: Truist Securities Raises Price Target for Tenet Healthcare
feed.summary: Truist Securities has raised its price target for Tenet Healthcare (THC) to $270.00 from $240.00, while maintaining a "Buy" rating. This increase reflects a general positive sentiment among analysts, with several other firms also recently upgrading Tenet's price targets. Despite the positive analyst outlook, GuruFocus's estimated GF Value suggests a potential downside from the current stock price.

feed.title: Antitrust Lawsuit Targets Union Pacific, K&O Railroads Over Grain Shipping Fees
feed.summary: A new antitrust lawsuit has been filed against Union Pacific Railroad and Kansas & Oklahoma Railroad (K&O) by grain farmers and agribusinesses, alleging increased rail traffic fees create competitive and financial barriers for local farmers. Weskan Grain CEO Will Bramblett explained that the lawsuit, supported by 13 farmers and two agribusinesses, aims to restore balance and fair access in grain transportation, especially concerning the Colorado Pacific Railroad and potential mergers like Union Pacific's bid with Norfolk Southern. Plaintiffs argue that these practices drive up transportation costs and transit times, making it harder for farmers to achieve fair prices for their crops.

feed.title: AMETEK INC/ SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: AMETEK INC released its 2025 Form 10-K report, highlighting strong financial performance with increased net sales, operating income, and diluted EPS. The company showcased growth through strategic acquisitions, global expansion, and operational excellence, emphasizing innovation across its Electronic Instruments Group and Electromechanical Group segments. Despite competitive and market risks, AMETEK remains focused on its Growth Model, aiming for sustained financial growth and strategic capital management.

feed.title: Pepsi Just Launched Its Own Prebiotic Soda—Months After Buying Poppi for $1.95 Billion
feed.summary: PepsiCo has launched its own prebiotic soda under the Pepsi brand, following its $1.95 billion acquisition of Poppi and CEO Ramon Laguarta's statement that fiber is the "next protein." The new product, which debuted online on Black Friday and is now available nationwide, offers consumers a fiber-rich cola option. This move is part of PepsiCo's broader strategy to integrate more fiber into its top-performing products.

feed.title: Assessing Applied Materials (AMAT) After A 108% One Year Share Price Surge
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) has seen a 108% share price surge over the past year, leading to an assessment of its current valuation using DCF analysis and P/E ratios. While the DCF model suggests the stock is overvalued, the P/E ratio, when compared to a tailored "Fair Ratio," indicates it might be undervalued. The article also presents "Narratives" for bullish and bearish cases, highlighting how different assumptions can drastically alter valuation perspectives.

feed.title: AT&T sued by New York City pension funds for excluding diversity proposal​
feed.summary: Four New York City public pension funds are suing AT&T for refusing to allow a shareholder vote on their proposal that would require the telecommunications company to publicly disclose its workforce's diversity breakdown. The funds argue that AT&T is wrongly citing a new SEC policy to exclude the proposal, despite having previously disclosed this information between 2021 and 2023. They seek an injunction to prevent AT&T from soliciting shareholder proxies that exclude their proposal, emphasizing the issue's importance, particularly as many companies de-emphasize diversity initiatives.

feed.title: UBS raises Howmet Aerospace stock price target on strong execution
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) to $260 from $228, while maintaining a Neutral rating, citing strong execution and record EBITDA margins. The company has demonstrated robust revenue growth and is expected to accelerate in 2026, driven by an aerospace recovery and increasing gas turbine power demand. Despite a strong financial health score, InvestingPro's fair value assessment suggests the stock is currently overvalued.

feed.title: Apple’s AI push welcomed by Wedbush analysts amid investor trepidation
feed.summary: Despite investor concerns and a recent stock sell-off, Wedbush analysts have maintained an ‘Outperform’ rating for Apple. They believe the current trepidation regarding potential AI feature delays is unwarranted, anticipating a comprehensive AI platform rollout throughout 2026, including significant updates to Siri. Analysts project that AI monetization could add $75 to $100 per share to Apple’s value in the coming years, positioning the company as a central player in the AI revolution.

feed.title: Why Diamondback (FANG) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (FANG) is expected to beat its upcoming earnings estimates, continuing a strong trend of surpassing projections. The company has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +0.91% and a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), indicating a high probability of another positive surprise. Diamondback Energy is scheduled to release its next earnings report on February 23, 2026.

feed.title: Netflix's 'Chef's Table' stages culinary weekend at Wynn Las Vegas
feed.summary: Wynn Resorts and Chef's Table have announced a global partnership to launch a multi-year culinary collaboration, commencing this fall. The program will debut with "Wynn Revelry by Chef's Table" in September at Wynn Las Vegas, featuring an Icons dinner, chef/celebrity cookoff, golf tournament, and a grand tasting event called "The Feast." This partnership aims to elevate Wynn's resorts as epicurean destinations and blend world-class dining with compelling programming.

feed.title: 15 Innovative Healthcare Stocks to Buy According to Analysts
feed.summary: This article lists innovative healthcare stocks favored by analysts, focusing on Travere Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:TVTX) as an example. Analyst firms like Piper Sandler and BofA recently raised their price targets for TVTX due to positive pre-announcements and an updated outlook on the company's biopharma coverage. Travere Therapeutics is highlighted as a biopharmaceutical company specializing in rare disease therapies, developing and commercializing new treatments for renal and metabolic conditions.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. (TCPC)
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is reminding investors of a looming April 6, 2026 deadline to file as lead plaintiff in a class action lawsuit against BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. (TCPC). The lawsuit alleges that BlackRock TCP made materially false and misleading statements about its financial health between November 2024 and January 2026, failing to disclose significant weaknesses in its portfolio and an overstatement of its net asset value. Investors who suffered losses on their BlackRock TCP investments during this period are urged to contact the firm.
